title: dombeya rottleroides
intro: Dombeya rottleroides, also known as the 'Rottler's tree', is a species of flowering plant in the hibiscus family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in African folk medicine, where its bark, roots, and leaves are used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Dombeya rottleroides include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat ailments like malaria and dysentery.
